name: io.github.runFleets/cli
title: Fleets
description: Multi-site analytics as tools: GA4, Search Console, Cloudflare edge, PageSpeed, insights.

environmentVariables.name: FLEETS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Fleets personal access token (fl_...). Optional if you have already run `fleets login`; otherwise mint one at https://fleets.run/app/account?tab=cli.
